creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
tabthorpe    2009-06-23 17:17:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ports-mgmt           Makefile 
  Added files:
    ports-mgmt/symports  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  symports reads through your ports tree and generates a tree using
  symlinks for all categories - not just the "real" ones.
  
  PR:             ports/135683
  Submitted by:   Eitan Adler <EitanAdlerList gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.25      +1 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/ports-mgmt/symports/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/symports/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/ports-mgmt/symports/pkg-descr (new)
